title: Fishing Loot Tweak│釣魚戰利品調整
description: Synchronizing with Bedrock Edition's fishing loot, and some treasure loot has been replaced with junk loot.│與基岩版釣魚戰利品機制同步，並且部分寶藏掉落物改為為垃圾掉落物。
body:
# Function│功能
- Remove the Saddle from the treasure loot.│將鞍移出寶藏戰利品。
- Remove the Name Tag from the treasure loot.│將命名牌移出寶藏戰利品。
- Add the Saddle to the junk loot, with a weight of 10.│將鞍加入垃圾戰利品，權重為10。
- Add the Name Tag to the junk loot, with a weight of 10.│將命名牌加入垃圾戰利品，權重為10。
- Add Cocoa Bean to Jungle Loot, limited to Jungle biomes, with a weight of 10.│將可可豆加入垃圾戰利品，僅限叢林生態域，權重為10。
